ac_evidence.ac: StringToResourceType maps all historically used resource strings to appropriate economy constants
ac_evidence.evidence: economy_integration.go: extended switch statement with 20 legacy mappings

ac_evidence.ac: Unknown strings are logged as warnings and mapped to a safe default (ResourceGrain)
ac_evidence.evidence: economy_integration.go: default case logs warning via log.Printf

ac_evidence.ac: A new test TestStringToResourceType_Unknown verifies the warning behavior
ac_evidence.evidence: economy_integration_test.go: TestStringToResourceType_Unknown checks unknown maps to ResourceGrain

ac_evidence.ac: The Validate method in economy.Resource still rejects invalid types, but the mapping ensures only valid types enter the inventory
ac_evidence.evidence: economy_integration.go: all mapped constants are valid economy.ResourceType; economy.ResourceGrain is valid

ac_evidence.ac: No regression in existing tests; all simulation and economy packages build successfully
ac_evidence.evidence: go test ./internal/simulation passes; go test ./internal/economy -run TestValidate passes

existing_work_summary: Found existing StringToResourceType function with limited mapping (food, ore, tool, wheat, gold) and no dedicated tests. Extended mapping to cover all legacy resource strings from codebase grep and added comprehensive test coverage.
